failure: The exploit is failing because the address of '/bin/sh' is being taken from the libc, which is not correct. The binary and the libc are different, and the address of '/bin/sh' in the libc will not be the same as in the binary. This is causing a segmentation fault (SIGSEGV).
next_action: line 7: change bin_sh_addr = next(libc.search(b'/bin/sh\x00')) to bin_sh_addr = next(binary.search(b'/bin/sh\x00'))
